headline: After resurrecting an iconic PC brand, Commodore is getting into flip phones
summary: Retro gaming YouTuber Christian Simpson revived the Commodore brand in 2025. The company is developing products reminiscent of the mid-1990s. Their latest offering is a new flip phone.

headline: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
summary: Anthropic fought the Trump administration over its latest model release. The company received a US export control directive to suspend access to Mythos 5. This occurred during a celebratory weekend for USA sports.

headline: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
summary: Meta's new AI Mode search on Facebook will leverage public posts for AI-generated results. This AI option will appear alongside standard search categories like 'People.' It's part of several new AI features Meta is rolling out.

headline: Xbox is closing down Hellblade creator Ninja Theory
summary: Xbox is reportedly closing Ninja Theory, the studio behind the Hellblade series. Staff members were informed of the closure on a recent call. The studio hopes to find a buyer amidst other Xbox studio cutbacks.

headline: James Gunn Describes Jimmy Olsen HBO Series as 'Both a Jimmy Olsen and a Gorilla Grodd Show'
summary: James Gunn clarified that the upcoming HBO series will feature both Jimmy Olsen and Gorilla Grodd. The show is part of the new DC Universe. It spins off from last year's Superman movie.

headline: Life is Strange Creator Don't Nod Warned It Will Run Out of Funds This Year
summary: Life is Strange developer Don't Nod is projected to run out of cash by November. The studio needs to secure new funding sources to avoid financial collapse. This warning puts the company's future in jeopardy.

headline: Bank Balances Rolled Back for Forza Horizon 6 Players Who Used Exploit to Amass a Billion Credits
summary: Playground Games is rolling back bank balances for Forza Horizon 6 players. An exploit allowed players to amass billions of credits illicitly. The developers are correcting the in-game economy imbalance.

headline: Major Helldivers 2 Patch Adds New Galactic Campaigns, New Control Center Terminal, and a Lot More
summary: Helldivers 2 received a significant update, patch 6.3.0, introducing new Galactic campaigns. The patch adds a new biome and a Control Center terminal. It also includes weapon, stratagem, and enemy balancing changes.

headline: Starmer pleased 'justice has been done' after arson attacks
summary: The prime minister expressed pleasure after two men were convicted of 2025 arson attacks. He stated he was 'very pleased for my family's sake.' The convictions bring a sense of justice after the incidents.

headline: Thames Water closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
summary: Thames Water faces potential nationalisation after the government rejected a rescue deal. The environment secretary deemed the deal insufficient for consumers and the environment. This decision pushes the utility closer to state control.

headline: Married at First Sight Australia allegations 'disturbing', says country's watchdog
summary: Allegations surrounding Married at First Sight Australia have been described as 'disturbing.' Australia's watchdog expressed concern over the claims. The UK's media regulator Ofcom also found them 'deeply concerning.'

headline: Woman left traumatised by swinging says website 'facilitated abuse'
summary: A woman claims a swinging website 'facilitated abuse' after her husband pressured her into unwanted sex. She endured significant trauma from the experience. She now seeks to warn others about her ordeal.
